root_cause.exact_runtime_boundary: automatic task selection ends before any call into next_action_engine_v1.mjs
root_cause.why_it_breaks: The active selector chooses merchant_registry_build / send_readiness_gate / send_preview and never invokes or reads next_action_engine_v1.mjs.

status_findings.evidence: router_decision_agent_binding_v1.mjs and its JSON output name next_action_engine_v1.mjs as next_action_owner
No active runtime entrypoint imports, shells, or otherwise executes next_action_engine_v1.mjs

status_findings.finding: binding plan references next_action_engine as candidate upstream input
status_findings.evidence: write_router_binding_plan_v1.mjs lists next_action_engine_v1.mjs among task selection candidates

status_findings.finding: no live worker found for the binding
status_findings.evidence: Runtime traces found no live caller for next_action_engine_v1.mjs
